case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. RAINER NEUMANN et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEUMANN, RAINER $5,001.18 PRINCIPAL, $68.50 INTEREST, $289.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,359.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
